name: @neus/mcp-server
description: Hosted NEUS MCP registry for agent identity, limited permissions, trust receipts, and Vault.
author: NEUS Network <dev@neus.network>

scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));const s=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('server.json','utf8'));if(p.version!==s.version)throw new Error('package.json and server.json version mismatch: '+p.version+' vs '+s.version);if(String(s.description||'').length>100)throw new Error('server.json description must be <=100 chars for MCP Registry (got '+String(s.description).length+')');"
